requests.prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Portable LED Lamp. The scene shows a cozy bedside/desk nook with a small light-wood table, and one adult hand enters the frame. A open paperback book with cream pages is nearby. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. Locked-off camera, medium close view of a small light-wood bedside table in a cozy room. The compact portable LED lamp from the reference image is already on, casting a soft, warm golden pool of light across an open paperback book on the table. Background shows a neutral wall and the edge of a neatly made white bed softly out of focus. Warm, calm evening ambiance. A single right hand with a neutral sweater cuff enters from the right, gently grips the lamp, lifts it a few inches, and slowly rotates it to show its compact size and smooth matte finish while keeping the warm glow visible on the tabletop. The hand sets the lamp back down beside the open book so the warm light clearly illuminates. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.

image_inputs.description: Shot start/key image used as the first-frame I2V conditioning image by the video backend.
Product identity reference for optional key-image/ref2img generation. It is not sent to the video backend as a separate product-reference conditioning image.

metadata.audio_direction: Gentle lo-fi beat; soft room tone. Subtle whoosh as the lamp is lifted, soft tap as it is placed down. Optional quiet VO: “Soft, warm light—take it anywhere.”
metadata.visual_prompt: Locked-off camera, medium close view of a small light-wood bedside table in a cozy room. The compact portable LED lamp from the reference image is already on, casting a soft, warm golden pool of light across an open paperback book on the table. Background shows a neutral wall and the edge of a neatly made white bed softly out of focus. Warm, calm evening ambiance. A single right hand with a neutral sweater cuff enters from the right, gently grips the lamp, lifts it a few inches, and slowly rotates it to show its compact size and smooth matte finish while keeping the warm glow visible on the tabletop. The hand sets the lamp back down beside the open book so the warm light clearly illuminates the pages. The same hand then nudges a small canvas travel pouch close to the lamp to suggest carry-friendly size. Hold steady for a final beat on the cozy scene: lamp, open book lit warmly, pouch beside it, brand mark on the lamp unobstructed if present. Subtle soft shadows, no reflections, minimal movement, simple and calm.

critic_expectation.purpose: Judge whether the raw video is a plausible product demo for Portable LED Lamp.
hard_requirements: single continuous raw video shot with steady one-take continuity

complete direct prompt: Locked-off camera, medium close view of a small light-wood bedside table in a cozy room. The compact portable LED lamp from the reference image is already on, casting a soft, warm golden pool of light across an open paperback book on the table. Background shows.
physically plausible handling of the product by one main subject
soft_context: The shot may hint at this customer context: Harsh or insufficient lighting and bulky lamps make late-night reading or desk work uncomfortable and inconvenient to move around.
Focus the judgment on the requested product action, proof visibility, and one-take continuity.
Expected subject and scene style from asset memory: One adult right hand with tidy nails and natural skin tone; no full face on camera.; Neutral knit long-sleeve cuff (beige.
quality_checks: stable face, hands, objects, and camera motion
main product action is visible and easy to understand
visible product appearance stays consistent with the product reference image
